items.title: NIO, Intuit, And Reddit Are Among Top 10 Large-Cap Losers Last Week (May 18-May 22): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
items.summary: Large-cap stocks in software, electric vehicles, data centers, and healthcare faced significant pressure last week due to weak guidance, regulatory concerns, rising bond yields, and competitive risks. Technology and China-linked companies led the declines, with ten major stocks experiencing notable losses ranging from 4.96% to 18.28%.

items.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy Reports Q1 Results: Details
items.summary: Strategy Inc. (MSTR) reported Q1 results with a loss of $38.25 per share but beat revenue expectations at $124.3 million versus consensus of $120.75 million. The company holds approximately 818,334 Bitcoins valued at $64.14 billion as of May 3, 2026. CEO Phong Le highlighted strong adoption of Bitcoin and success of their Digital Credit product STRC. Stock was down 0.89% in after-hours trading.
